## Impact

**Who will benefit**:
- [ ] End users
- [ ] Developers
- [ ] System administrators
- [ ] Other: ___

**Priority** (your opinion):
- [ ] Critical - Blocks important use cases
- [ ] High - Significantly improves experience
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Minor improvement
